summary: Single-commodity register from Incahuasi — AB=94% (most monochrome Incahuasi khipu). 90 cords, 28 clusters, only 2 STRING (qaqa x2). 1-PAIRE depth L3. 11 L-1 (12% data loss).
interpretation:
IDENTIFICATION
  90 cords. 2 STRING (qaqa x2, 100%), 53 INT, 24 EMPTY (27%), 11 L-1 (12%).
  Architecture: 1-PAIRE, depth L3. 28 clusters. Colors: AB(85=94%), MB(3), W(2).
  Provenance: Incahuasi. Museum: Proyecto Incahuasi.
  AB=94% = most monochrome of all Incahuasi khipus.

NARRATIVE
  Eighty-five of ninety cords, the same color. AB at 94% — the most concentrated single-color khipu at Incahuasi. Twenty-eight clusters averaging three cords each. Two rocks named, and nothing more. A single commodity, counted twenty-eight times.
